description_long: This is a rich chocolate muffin with a glossy, thick layer of chocolate frosting covering the top. The muffin is topped with several large, white marshmallows and a generous drizzle of dark chocolate sauce, creating a visually indulgent appearance. The surface of the muffin itself is textured and slightly uneven, typical of baked goods, while the frosting appears smooth and shiny. The muffin is encased in a dark, crinkled paper wrapper that hugs its base tightly. Small bits of what appear to be chopped nuts are visible among the marshmallows and chocolate drizzle, adding texture and contrast. The overall look is decadent and inviting, reminiscent of a gourmet s'mores-inspired treat.
description: A chocolate muffin topped with marshmallows, chocolate drizzle, and nuts, finished with glossy chocolate frosting and a dark paper wrapper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muffin's thick chocolate frosting, three marshmallows, chocolate drizzle, and visible chopped nuts.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the glossy frosting and marshmallows, with the chocolate drizzle more prominent and fewer nuts visible.
description_view_2: A clear view of the marshmallows and nuts on top, with the chocolate drizzle and frosting appearing thick and smooth.
description_view_3: This side emphasizes the marshmallows and chocolate drizzle, with the frosting's shine and the wrapper's texture clearly visible.
attribute_frosting_style: thick, glossy chocolate frosting with drizzled chocolate sauce
